'''Plattahr''' was a [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] enforcer on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Phorliss]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] when he attempted to extort [[Gorb Drig]].
